summary: End-to-end verification of the 3 new Castify features: (1) Indian-only filter on Movies/Music/Sports rails, (2) Favorites feature with localStorage persistence + player favorite button, (3) In-player next/previous channel navigation via side buttons and keyboard (ArrowRight/ArrowLeft) + ESC close. Backend: 11/11 pytest tests pass. Frontend: all critical player, favorites, persistence, and German-toggle flows pass.
critical_code_review_comments: VideoPlayerModal keyboard handler fires on ArrowLeft/ArrowRight anywhere on the window. It correctly skips INPUT/TEXTAREA, but does NOT skip contentEditable or other elements. Fine for now, but worth being aware of.

goRelative uses `currentIndex === -1 ? 0 : currentIndex` fallback — if a favorited channel is currently playing but has since been removed from the visible flatPlaylist (e.g. user switched nav tab while modal was open), pressing next will jump to whatever index 0 is, which may feel non-intuitive. Low priority.

useFavorites stores favorites keyed by channel `id` which is a hash of category+URL. Because the category label wins ordering (Movies > Music > Sports > Hindi > German), a channel URL that is both Hindi and Movies gets the 'movies_...' id. If the backend later reorders category insertion, users' saved favorite ids will become stale. Consider hashing on URL alone.
server.py refresh_channels() clears the channels collection BEFORE inserting new working set (line 217). Same issue flagged in iteration_1 — still present.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (added 3 new test cases for Indian filter, Indian-branded movie names, and stable-id persistence)
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: None — backend auto-probes public M3U playlists on startup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend counts observed live: Movies=16, Sports=3, Hindi=130 (limit_per_category caps display to 60 by default), Music=7, German=251. Working streams ~407 of 655 probed. Every stream URL is geo-blocked so the modal shows 'player-error' overlay with 'Stream unavailable' — read the modal channel title with selector '[data-testid="player-modal"] .font-heading.font-bold.text-lg' (NOT .text-xl which is the error heading). The German toggle testid is 'german-toggle' (a <button role=switch>, NOT a checkbox). Favorites persist in localStorage under key 'castify_favorites_v1' and survive full page reload. Channel ids are stable md5-based hashes so favorites are safe across process restarts.
rca of the issue: No production bugs found. All 3 new features work as specified: Indian filter reduces Movies/Music/Sports as expected, favorites toggle + persist + rail-my-favorites shows at top of Home, and player prev/next both via clicks and keyboard (ArrowRight -> next, ArrowLeft -> back, ESC -> close) all functional. Player favorite button correctly toggles state and reflects on My Favorites rail after modal close.
